title: cleomella angustifolia
intro: Cleomella angustifolia, also known as White Butterfly Bush, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cleomella angustifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin issues like eczema and acne. Cleomella angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile plant for various herbal preparations.
